mapper.select: SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM resource_view_log WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT c.name AS category_name, COUNT(v.id) AS count FROM resource_view_log v LEFT JOIN teaching_resource r ON v.resource_id = r.id LEFT JOIN resource_category c ON r.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name
